title: Live from Davos! Milei goes viral, Adam Neumann's headwinds, streaming's broken model, microplastics & more
description:
(0:00) Live from the WEF: "Oh Davos, Kumbaya"

(4:25) Why Davos lost its luster, plus major moments: Milei's speech, Jamie Dimon on Trump

(21:53) Boeing's regulatory capture leading to negative impact on consumer safety

(35:16) Adam Neumann facing familiar challenges at his new startup, Flow

(50:24) Evaluating "tech-enabled businesses" vs. traditional businesses that are utilizing technology

(1:00:47) Streaming at a crossroads: is the business model broken?

(1:20:51) Science Corner: New study on microplastics in water bottles

(1:32:42) All-In Poker

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics live from Davos, including Javier Milei's viral speech, Adam Neumann's new startup challenges, and the broken streaming business model. They also touch on Boeing's regulatory capture, microplastics in water bottles, and the intersection of technology and traditional businesses. The hosts share their insights and opinions on these topics, providing a comprehensive overview of the current state of affairs.

takeaways.text: Boeing's regulatory capture harms consumer safety
Adam Neumann faces challenges at Flow
Tech-enabled businesses are changing the game
Regulatory capture can have negative consequences

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concern about various issues, including regulatory capture, the broken streaming business model, and the growing problem of microplastics.

notable_moments.description: Introduction to the podcast live from Davos
Discussion about Davos losing its luster
Boeing's regulatory capture and its impact on consumer safety
Adam Neumann's challenges at his new startup, Flow
